## OpenFang Parity+ Deployment/Usability/Runtime Pack (Queued, 2026-02-28)

Objective: close remaining practical gaps in install experience, daily operator ergonomics, and runtime efficiency so Protheus beats lightweight agent kernels on real-world usability without sacrificing sovereign governance.

| Concern | Disposition | Canonical Backlog Coverage | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Single command operator surface | covered | `V3-OPS-004`, `V3-OPS-015` | Keep canonical `protheus` surface and deprecate raw script entrypoints. |
| Daemonized control-plane lifecycle | covered + strengthened | `V3-OPS-005` | Add local RPC/runtime prewarm details via `V3-RTE-002` (below). |
| Cross-system benchmark comparability | covered + strengthened | `V3-OF-010` | Add internal stable benchmark profile contract in `V3-BENCH-001` (below). |
| Build trust/provenance for release artifacts | covered + strengthened | `V3-048` | Add installer + build matrix requirements tied to provenance verification. |

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-DEP-001 | hardening | V3 | done | Deterministic One-Line Installer + Signed Release Channel | Install friction remains too high compared to single-binary agent kernels | Ship deterministic installer flow (`curl Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/openfang_parity_runtime.ts`. | sh` + offline script variant) that verifies signed artifact + checksum/SBOM provenance before install, supports explicit version pinning, and fails closed on verification mismatch |
| V3-DEP-002 | hardening | V3 | done | Delta Auto-Update + Atomic Rollback Lane | Users should get seamless upgrades without risky partial updates | Add update channel with delta/full modes, pre-apply compatibility checks, post-update health verification, and automatic rollback to last-known-good binary/config state with deterministic receipts |
| V3-DEP-003 | extension | V3 | done | Air-Gapped/Offline Install Bundle | Enterprise and restricted environments require no-network installation path | Produce signed offline bundle containing binary, policies, migration scripts, and verification tool; install and verify entirely offline with replayable attestation receipts |
| V3-RTE-001 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Warm-Start Snapshot Restore for Sub-Second Boot | Cold-start time remains a visible competitive metric for daily usability | Add policy-bound warm-start snapshot/restore path that restores safe runtime caches/state checkpoints at startup; benchmark proves cold-start improvement without replay or integrity regressions |
| V3-RTE-002 | extension | V3 | done | Persistent Daemon RPC Control Socket + Prewarm | Repeated CLI startup cost can dominate operator interactions | Extend daemon/client split with local RPC control socket, process prewarm, command multiplexing, and deterministic request/response receipts; operator commands avoid full runtime re-bootstrap |
| V3-RTE-003 | hardening | V3 | done | Runtime Performance Budget Gate (CI + Release) | Performance regressions should be blocked automatically, not discovered post-release | Add policy thresholds for cold start, idle RSS, and p95 command/task latency; CI/release gates fail on regression beyond budget with trend artifacts and exception approval path |
| V3-RTE-004 | extension | V3 | done | Adaptive Idle Governor | Long-running instances should reduce idle burn without reducing correctness | Add idle-mode downshift for probes/workers/caches by policy, demand-triggered rapid wake, and correctness parity checks proving no capability loss under idle throttling |
| V3-USE-001 | extension | V3 | done | First-Run Onboarding Doctor (`protheus init`) | Initial setup complexity still requires too much manual context | Add guided first-run doctor that validates identity, terms ack, secret/provider readiness, policy prerequisites, and returns deterministic ready/not-ready status with remediation steps |
| V3-USE-002 | hardening | V3 | done | Redacted Diagnostics Bundle (`protheus doctor --bundle`) | Fast support/debugging needs one deterministic artifact instead of ad-hoc log gathering | Generate one redacted diagnostics bundle with health snapshots, gate results, runtime profiles, policy versions, and failure traces; include deterministic redaction attestations and bundle hash receipts |
| V3-USE-003 | hardening | V3 | done | CLI UX Contract (Stable Flags + Completions + JSON Parity) | Operator trust drops when command semantics drift between versions | Define and enforce stable CLI grammar/flag contract, shell completions, and required `--json` parity across operator commands; schema-check all CLI outputs in contract tests |
| V3-BENCH-001 | hardening | V3 | done | Public Benchmark Profile Registry + Replay Harness | Fair comparison requires reproducible task/model/budget profiles across releases and competitors | Add versioned benchmark profile registry and replay harness producing deterministic metrics/artifacts; support local and CI runs with fixed seeds/budgets and publishable report bundles |
| V3-BLD-001 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Release Build Matrix Optimizer (LTO/PGO/musl/strip per target) | Runtime efficiency depends on disciplined target-specific build optimization | Add platform-specific optimized build matrix with repeatable profiles (e.g., LTO/PGO/strip/static variants), produce size/startup/memory comparison artifacts per release, and gate promotion on policy targets |

## Anti-Copy / Reverse-Engineering Hardening Intake (Normalized, 2026-02-28)
Implementation (2026-03-01): Delivered `client/runtime/systems/security/copy_hardening_pack.ts` (+ wrapper/policy/test) for per-instance build diversification, forensic watermark mesh, trust-degrade profiles, encrypted module seal/unseal, instrumentation detection, honey traps, and clone-risk scoring with deterministic receipts.

Objective: raise reverse-engineering and clone-operability cost by combining cryptographic binding, runtime attestation, diversified artifacts, and deceptive detection surfaces while preserving deterministic governance.

| Candidate Control | Disposition | Canonical Coverage | Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Soul-token anti-clone + watermark baseline | covered (already delivered) | `V2-058` (done), `V3-026` (done) | Keep as base identity authority; extend depth via forensic and lease layers below. |
| Binary anti-debug/tamper hook lane | covered + strengthened | `V3-BIN-004` (done) | Add instrumentation-response lifecycle + forensic evidence contracts in `V3-CPY-006`. |
| Attested debug mode for rightful operator | covered | `V3-BIN-003` (done) | Keep gated debug channel; pair with encrypted module delivery in `V3-CPY-005`. |
| Attested capability lease service | net-new | `V3-CPY-001` (below) | Add cryptographic runtime lease gate for premium capabilities. |
| Per-instance polymorphic build diversification | net-new | `V3-CPY-002` (below) | Make one crack non-portable across fleet instances/releases. |
| Forensic watermark propagation beyond build artifacts | net-new | `V3-CPY-003` (below) | Add traceability across binary/runtime/receipt surfaces. |
| Graceful degraded mode on trust drift | net-new | `V3-CPY-004` (below) | Drop capability safely instead of all-or-nothing fail behavior. |
| Runtime encrypted module delivery/unseal | net-new | `V3-CPY-005` (below) | Avoid shipping plaintext high-value capability modules at rest. |
| Honey capabilities / canary API traps | net-new | `V3-CPY-007` (below) | Detect stolen builds and unauthorized usage early. |
| Clone-risk behavioral engine (license/usage drift) | net-new | `V3-CPY-008` (below) | Detect suspicious clone-like usage patterns and throttle/revoke. |

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-CPY-001 | hardening | V3 | done | Attested Capability Lease Server Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_cpy_001_anchor.ts`. | Static binaries alone are copyable; capability access should require short-lived cryptographic authorization | Delivered `client/runtime/systems/security/capability_lease.ts` (issue/verify/consume lifecycle with scoped TTL leases, consume-on-use semantics, and deterministic revocation/expiry checks) with auditable state/receipt outputs (`state/security/capability_leases.json`, `state/security/capability_lease_audit.jsonl`) and fail-closed verification paths used by policy-root governance. Runtime visibility coverage is exercised via `client/memory/tools/tests/health_status.test.js` branch-health lease counters. |
| V3-CPY-002 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Per-Instance Polymorphic Build Diversification | Uniform binaries let a single reverse-engineering effort scale to all copies | Build pipeline emits per-instance diversified binary variants (layout/constant/packaging polymorphism) while preserving functional parity and signed provenance receipts; crack on one artifact does not transfer trivially to others |
| V3-CPY-003 | hardening | V3 | done | Forensic Watermark Mesh (Artifact + Runtime + Receipt) | Leak attribution should survive repackaging/log stripping attempts | Embed verifiable watermark markers across build artifact metadata, runtime handshake payloads, and passport/black-box receipts; provide deterministic extraction tool and chain-of-custody report for leak forensics |
| V3-CPY-004 | hardening | V3 | done | Trust-Drift Graceful Degrade Mode | Hard stop-only responses can increase operational brittleness and hide attribution signal | When attestation/symbiosis trust drops below policy, runtime auto-downgrades to bounded low-capability profile (`read_only/sandbox_only/no_external_spend`) with explicit reason receipts and restoration ceremony requirements |
| V3-CPY-005 | hardening | V3 | done | Encrypted Module Delivery + Runtime Unseal Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_cpy_005_anchor.ts`. | Shipping plaintext high-value modules simplifies static extraction and repackaging | High-value capability packs/modules are stored encrypted at rest, unsealed in-memory only after attested boot + lease verification, never persisted plaintext post-load, and re-sealed on shutdown/rotation with auditable key lifecycle receipts |
| V3-CPY-006 | hardening | V3 | done | Instrumentation/Hooking Detection + Response Lifecycle Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_cpy_006_anchor.ts`. | Runtime hooks (ptrace/frida/preload) are common reverse-engineering vectors against protected binaries | Add runtime detector set for debugger/instrumentation/hook signatures, policy-bounded response actions (alert -> degrade -> quarantine), false-positive budget controls, and deterministic forensic capture receipts |
| V3-CPY-007 | extension | V3 | done | Honey Capability + Canary API Trap Plane | Stolen or emulated instances are easier to detect with non-production decoy surfaces | Provision decoy capabilities/endpoints/secrets with zero production utility, monitor touches as high-confidence abuse indicators, and auto-link detections into sentinel/quarantine evidence pipelines |
| V3-CPY-008 | hardening | V3 | done | Clone-Risk Behavioral Engine (Usage/License Drift) | Clones often reveal themselves through behavior drift even when binaries are modified | Score usage anomalies (device/geo/concurrency/lease-pattern drift), map scores to throttle/restrict/revoke actions, require appeal/recovery workflows, and emit explainable risk receipts with bias/false-positive monitoring |

Dependency notes:
- `V3-CPY-001` depends on `V2-058`, `V2-063`, `V3-031`, and `V3-BLK-001`.
- `V3-CPY-002` depends on `V3-BIN-002`, `V3-BLD-001`, and `V3-048`.
- `V3-CPY-003` depends on `V2-058`, `V2-031`, `V2-063`, and `V3-048`.
- `V3-CPY-004` depends on `V3-031`, `V3-033`, `V3-GOV-001`, and `V3-BUD-001`.
- `V3-CPY-005` depends on `V3-OF-006`, `V3-BIN-003`, `V3-SK-001`, and key lifecycle lanes.
- `V3-CPY-006` depends on `V3-BIN-004`, `V3-033`, and `V3-034`.
- `V3-CPY-007` depends on `V3-OF-005`, `V3-OF-009`, and `V3-ENT-003`.
- `V3-CPY-008` depends on `V3-ENT-001`, `V3-CPY-001`, `V3-BLK-001`, and `V3-MLC-002`.

## Selective Copying Hardening (Skin Protection Layer)

Objective: Make selective copying/removal of defense logic non-viable by coupling critical authorization paths to explicit defense contracts, attesting runtime integrity continuously, and enforcing governed anti-RE hardening telemetry with deterministic containment.

| ID | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|----|--------|---------|-----|---------------|------------|
| V3-SKIN-001 | done | Contract-Coupled Defense Dependency Mesh | Removing defenses should break authorization paths, not create undefined runtime behavior | Added `client/runtime/systems/security/skin_protection_layer.ts` contract mesh lane (`state_kernel/proposal_gating/execution_primitive/memory_traversal`) with deterministic reason codes; actuation now evaluates this gate in `client/runtime/systems/actuation/actuation_executor.ts` before execution and blocks fail-closed when containment is active; merge + contract checks now assert lane presence (`client/runtime/systems/security/merge_guard.ts`, `client/runtime/systems/spine/contract_check.ts`). | V3-SK-001, V3-FCH-002, V3-033, V3-034, V3-VENOM-000 |
| V3-SKIN-002 | done | Runtime Tamper Attestation + Self-Containment | Detect live patching/removal attempts and contain safely | SKIN runtime attestation now combines integrity kernel + remote heartbeat posture checks (`integrity_policy_path`, heartbeat latest/quarantine alignment), and can transition to deterministic stasis containment state (`state/security/skin_protection/stasis_state.json`) via `verify/enforce` flows with forensic history receipts. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_skin_002_anchor.ts`. | V3-BIN-003, V3-CPY-006, V3-VENOM-005 |
| V3-SKIN-003 | done | Binary Hardening Profile + Anti-RE Telemetry | Raise reverse-engineering cost while preserving maintainability | SKIN binary hardening gate validates minimum obfuscation tier + anti-debug false-positive budget against binary receipts/artifacts, emits deterministic audit outputs, and is covered by `client/memory/tools/tests/skin_protection_layer.test.js` with shadow/enforce posture checks. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/security/skin_protection_layer.js`. | V3-BIN-002, V3-BIN-004, V3-CPY-002, V3-VENOM-000 |

## Poison Dart Frog Defensive Layer (Active Internal Containment, Defensive-Only)

Objective: Make Protheus highly attractive and fully functional for legitimate soul-bound users, while ensuring any unauthorized copy or interface attempt activates internal containment mechanisms that render the stolen instance progressively low-value and ultimately unusable.

| ID | Status | Upgrade | Why (Poison Dart Frog) | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|----|--------|---------|------------------------|---------------|------------|
| V3-VENOM-000 | done | No Offensive Behavior Invariant | All mechanisms must remain strictly defensive, legal, bounded, auditable, and reversible | Enforced in `client/runtime/systems/security/venom_containment_layer.ts` via `defensiveInvariantStatus` + fail-closed checks and policy contract in `client/runtime/config/venom_containment_policy.json` (`offensive_behaviors_forbidden`). Foundation/contract checks now assert this lane. | All V3-VENOM items |
| V3-VENOM-001 | done | Attractive Full-Capability Facade + Triggered Containment Escalation | The stolen copy appears completely normal and powerful at first, encouraging deeper engagement before containment activates | Implemented trust-gated escalation in `evaluateContainment` (`client/runtime/systems/security/venom_containment_layer.ts`) using soul-token + startup-attestation signals; ingress now stamps containment metadata and blocks only when non-shadow enforcement is enabled (`client/runtime/systems/security/request_ingress.ts`). | V3-CPY-001, V3-033, V2-058, V3-BLK-001 |
| V3-VENOM-002 | done | Defensive Decoy Response Layer (Non-Destructive) | Unauthorized sessions receive specially crafted low-value outputs designed to provide no useful IP or training value | Added deterministic non-destructive decoys (`generateDecoyResponse`) with watermark lineage, bounded quality tiers, and bounded distillation-resistance overlays (decoy distillation guard); ingress now enforces decoy-only output mode from configured stage (enforcement decoy from stage) in non-shadow runtime (`client/runtime/systems/security/request_ingress.ts`). | V3-CPY-003, V3-CPY-007, V2-063 |
| V3-VENOM-003 | done | Bounded Verification Friction Escalation | Unauthorized copies encounter escalating but bounded verification challenges that increase operational cost | Stage-specific bounded friction/challenge scores are now runtime-enforced in ingress: bounded delay (`REQUEST_CONTAINMENT_DELAY_MS`) plus proof-of-work challenge gate (`verification_challenge`, `verifyChallengeProof`) in non-shadow mode; still capped by policy bounds (`max_friction_delay_ms`, `max_challenge_score`). Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_venom_003_anchor.ts`. | V3-CPY-001, V3-OPS-014, V3-BUD-001 |
| V3-VENOM-004 | done | Timed Lease Decay + Deterministic Lockout | Stolen copies function normally for a policy-defined period, then gradually lose capabilities in a predictable way | Implemented policy-defined stealth lease windows (timed lease stealth window hours) that defer staged hit escalation, followed by deterministic ramp (tease -> challenge -> degrade -> lockout) with cooldown lockout timers and session state persistence in `state/security/venom_containment/*`. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_venom_004_anchor.ts`. | V3-CPY-001, V3-CPY-004, V3-ENT-001 |
| V3-VENOM-005 | done | Self-Reporting Forensic Beacon System | Every unauthorized attempt automatically generates and returns detailed forensic evidence to the root | Unauthorized events now emit forensic bundles + JSONL evidence (forensic events jsonl, evidence dir) and mirror sanitized beacon records to master conduit queue (master queue path). Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_venom_005_anchor.ts`. | V3-CPY-003, V3-USE-002, V2-031 |
| V3-VENOM-006 | done | Adaptive Defense Evolution Engine | The protective mechanisms improve over time based on observed attack patterns | Added profile evolution (evolve profiles) from containment telemetry and persisted runtime bias/uplift outputs (profiles json); containment evaluation now consumes evolved runtime bias + redteam adaptive cost profiles to modulate live friction/challenge/decoy intensity before ingress enforcement. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_venom_006_anchor.ts`. | V3-034, V3-RED-001, V3-CPY-008 |
| V3-VENOM-007 | done | Staged Containment Ramp | Apply containment in deterministic stages to minimize false positives while still converging unauthorized copies to unusable state | Implemented policy-driven staged ramp thresholds (`staged_ramp`) with bounded tease window before stricter containment and deterministic receipt trail; covered by venom test. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_venom_007_anchor.ts`. | V3-VENOM-001, V3-VENOM-004, V3-VENOM-000 |

## Red Team Adaptive Defense Expansion

Objective: Enable the Soldier Ant Red Team to proactively discover, invent, and evolve open-ended defensive tools/capabilities against emerging external breach technologies while maintaining strict governance and defensive-only behavior.

| ID | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|----|--------|---------|-----|---------------|------------|

## Red Team Cost-Escalation Evolution (Increasingly Costly Defenses)

Objective: allow Soldier Ant to evolve defensive controls that progressively raise operational cost for unauthorized copies/trespassers, including adaptation to detected unauthorized runtime stack characteristics, while remaining strictly defensive, bounded, and legal.

| ID | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|----|--------|---------|-----|---------------|------------|
| V3-RED-ESC-001 | done | Adaptive Cost-Escalation Profiles + Runtime Fingerprint Classes | Fixed friction profiles are easier to optimize around; adaptive profiles should tune defense pressure by unauthorized runtime class | Update cost profiles now derives stack-adaptive challenge/friction/decoy/rate-limit profiles by runtime fingerprint class from containment telemetry and stores them in cost profiles json. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_001_anchor.ts`. | V3-RED-002, V3-VENOM-003, V3-VENOM-006, V3-VENOM-000 |
| V3-RED-ESC-002 | done | Dynamic Friction Scaling Controller | Unauthorized persistence should automatically increase challenge cost while preserving deterministic containment behavior | Dynamic friction scaling is implemented in venom stage profiles + adaptive profile multipliers, bounded by policy limits and surfaced in deterministic run receipts/history. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_002_anchor.ts`. | V3-RED-ESC-001, V3-VENOM-003, V3-CPY-001, V3-BUD-001 |
| V3-RED-ESC-003 | done | Bounded Resource-Sink Decoy Paths | Prolonged unauthorized probing should consume disproportionate attacker resources without unsafe behavior | Added bounded resource-sink semantics via stack-pressure + decoy profiles (`max_resource_sink_factor`, finite constraints, non-destructive flags) in adaptive defense policy/runner. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_003_anchor.ts`. | V3-RED-ESC-001, V3-VENOM-003, V3-VENOM-007, V3-VENOM-000 |
| V3-RED-ESC-004 | done | Evolutionary Cost Model Trainer (Stack-Adaptive + Category Expansion) | Cost-escalation quality should improve continuously from incidents and self-play, including when existing defense categories plateau | Adaptive runner now recalibrates cost model each cycle, reports uplift vs target, and proposes category expansion when telemetry indicates pressure concentration. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_red_esc_004_anchor.ts`. | V3-RED-001, V3-RED-002, V3-RED-ESC-001, V3-VENOM-006 |

Objective: close the remaining race-fitness gap by upgrading runtime substrate, memory substrate, model nervous system, event-sourced state, and swarm orchestration while preserving sovereignty/governance invariants.

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-001 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Rust Core Runtime Kernel Slice | Node control-plane hot paths will become a throughput and latency bottleneck under high cell concurrency and real-time actuation. | Rust service lane owns at least spine router + spawn broker + actuation dispatch hot paths with behavior parity harness against current TS runtime, shadow-first rollout, and deterministic rollback path. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RMEM-001, V3-OPS-005, V3-OPS-006 |
| V3-RACE-002 | hardening | V3 | done | Wasmtime Capability Microkernel Lane | User-space JS runtime alone is insufficient for strongest isolation of generated/untrusted execution. | All untrusted/generated execution can be routed through capability-scoped WASM sandbox with fuel limits, IO caps, deterministic timeout/termination receipts, and policy-gated fallback. | V3-OF-001, V3-CPY-006, V3-VENOM-000 |
| V3-RACE-003 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Event-Sourced Control Plane + CQRS Materialized Views | Imperative mutable state limits replay/debug/audit quality at scale. | Append-only event log is authoritative for control-plane mutations; materialized views derive from event stream; deterministic replay reconstructs equivalent state for audited windows. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-SK-001, V3-SK-002, V3-SK-007 |
| V3-RACE-004 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Model Catalog + Live Routing Scoreboard Service | Current model/provider routing lacks one canonical live score service spanning cost/latency/quality/fallback chain fitness. | Versioned model catalog service publishes live scorecards; router consumes scorecards for chain selection with confidence + budget-aware fallback policy; regression tests enforce decision determinism. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/routing/model_catalog_service.ts`, `client/memory/tools/tests/backlog_execution_pathfinder.test.js`. | RM-121, V3-BUD-001, V3-ECO-001 |
| V3-RACE-005 | hardening | V3 | done | Thought-to-Action Trace Contract (Intent -> Model -> Tool -> Outcome) | Incident/root-cause loops still rely on multi-file reconstruction instead of one end-to-end trace contract. | Mandatory trace propagation (`trace_id/request_id/run_id/job_id`) across intent, model calls, tool calls, and outcomes with auto-generated failure narrative bundles and deterministic replay links. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/observability/thought_action_trace_contract.ts`, `client/memory/tools/tests/backlog_execution_pathfinder.test.js`. | V3-OBS-002, RM-005, V2-063 |

| V3-RACE-007 | extension | V3 | done | Cross-Cell Memory Exchange Plane (Policy-Governed) | Cell-level intelligence sharing is still mostly hereditary/master-reviewed; high-signal exchange needs a governed fast lane. | Policy-governed cross-cell memory exchange with conflict-resolution strategy, consistency receipts, and strict anti-drift gates; disabled-by-default P2P unsafe paths remain blocked. | Enforce invariants: risk-tier <=2 default, JetStream publication on tithe/contribution mutations, constitution compliance, shadow/two-gate/reversion patterns | `V3-RACE-022`, `V3-RACE-017`, `V3-038` | done | Bind tithe mutations to event receipts and policy gates; block live tier3+ without explicit second-gate approval. |
| Integrate donation effect into guard/fractal/router/model-catalog and open platform surface | `V3-RACE-022`, `V3-RACE-019`, `V3-RACE-016`, `V3-RACE-004` | done | Wire effective-tithe computation into actuation prechecks and donor-priority hints for heavy fractal/model workloads under bounded fairness policy. |

| Acceptance proofs: simulated donation pipeline, tithe-engine test-mode output, docs update, tests passing | `V3-RACE-022` | done | Add integration test harness + `docs/client/ECONOMY.md` flywheel section and deterministic acceptance artifact bundle. |

### V3-RACE-022 Requirement Decomposition (Execution Checklist)

- `client/runtime/systems/economy/tithe_engine.*`: `calculateEffectiveTithe`, `getBaseTitheRate`, `applyDiscountAndRecord`.
- `client/runtime/systems/economy/gpu_contribution_tracker.*`: signed node registration + telemetry-derived GPU-hours + oracle validation.
- `client/runtime/systems/economy/tithe_ledger.*`: JetStream-backed mutation ledger + materialized discount view.
- `client/runtime/systems/economy/contribution_oracle.*`: proof validation (telemetry + signature + anti-fraud checks).
- `client/runtime/systems/economy/discount_policy.json`: tier table (0/100/1000/5000/10000 hour brackets).
- `client/runtime/systems/economy/smart_contract_bridge.*`: sovereign bridge receipt mint hook for donor tithe artifacts.
- `platform/api/donate_gpu.*` (or equivalent compatibility wrapper): registration token + current discount response.
- Integration hooks: `guard` effective-tithe precheck, fractal donor-priority scheduling, model/risk heavy-task donor preference, soul `GPU Patron` continuity marker.
- Acceptance contract: end-to-end simulation + receipts + docs + passing unit/integration suites.

## Deep Audit Gap Intake (Codex full-system review, 2026-03-01)

Objective: capture concrete, evidence-backed gaps found during full-system audit and normalize them into executable backlog tickets + human-owned coordination items.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Deep Audit)

| Audit-Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Dist-runtime migration contract must match reality (no false-green legacy-pair claims) | `V3-RACE-060` | done | Added reconciliation policy + incident emission + backlog done-status guard in `dist_runtime_cutover legacy-pairs`, wired into merge/foundation gates. |
| Time-sensitive tests must be deterministic and date-agnostic | `V3-RACE-061` | done | Added deterministic `PROTHEUS_NOW_ISO`/policy-now hooks across TTL/age-sensitive lanes (`client/runtime/lib/queued_backlog_runtime.ts`, `client/runtime/systems/ops/ci_baseline_guard.ts`, `client/runtime/systems/ops/post_launch_migration_readiness.ts`, `client/cognition/habits/scripts/queue_gc.js`) with regression coverage. |
| Benchmark artifacts must be internally consistent and policy-scoped | `V3-RACE-062` | done | Added policy-scoped benchmark artifacts (`history` + `latest` + report meta), strict `consistency-check` validation, freshness checks, and scope-contamination blocking in `client/runtime/systems/memory/rust_memory_transition_lane.ts` (+ tests). |
| Rust index benchmarking should measure runtime behavior, not `cargo run` startup tax | `V3-RACE-063` | done | Warm-path benchmark lane now enforces daemon transport for query/get probes, prewarms runtime, separates cold-build metric, and prefers prebuilt Rust binary for index/probe commands before cargo fallback. |
| High sync-process spawn count must be reduced in hot lanes | `V3-RACE-064` | done | Memory hot lane now runs daemon-first with CLI fallback only, CLI path prefers prebuilt binary over cargo-run, and benchmark receipts now include rust p95/p99 latency telemetry for warm-path verification. |
| Rust memory runtime needs active vector-similarity retrieval, not schema-only embedding storage | `V3-RACE-065` | done | Rust query runtime now supports lexical+vector hybrid scoring (`--score-mode=hybrid | lexical`) with `vector_enabled`/`score_mode` telemetry and SQLite embedding-map activation in hot query path. |
| Memory DB encryption must be canonical AEAD/envelope, not ad-hoc cipher shim | `V3-RACE-066` | done | Cut over hot-state encryption to AEAD envelope (`aead-v1`), added tamper fail-closed tests, and retired runtime legacy decrypt path with automatic migration of legacy/plain rows at DB open. |
| Memory indices must satisfy freshness schedule automatically | `V3-RACE-067` | done | Added `client/runtime/systems/memory/memory_index_freshness_gate.ts` + policy + tests with strict freshness enforcement, optional rebuild workflow, and merge/foundation gate wiring. |
| Advisory JS holdouts should be migrated/retired under an explicit wave plan | `V3-RACE-068` | done | Extended `client/runtime/systems/ops/js_holdout_audit.ts` with churn-ranked `wave-plan`, exception-registry diff snapshots, strict/root auditing, and regression tests; merge/foundation contracts updated accordingly. |
| Repo docs/client/runtime/config must reject unresolved merge-conflict markers | `V3-RACE-CONF-008` | done | Implemented `client/runtime/systems/security/conflict_marker_guard` + merge/foundation hooks with strict CI failure and remediation receipts. |

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-060 | hardening | V3 | done | Dist Runtime Contract Reconciliation Gate (Legacy-Pair Truth Source) | Runtime migration confidence is degraded when backlog/test/contracts claim zero legacy pairs while live checks report active pairs. | `runtime:dist:legacy --strict=1` is green, failing pair deltas auto-open incidents, and backlog status cannot remain `done` when contract checks fail. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V2-003, BL-014, V3-AEX-002 |
| V3-RACE-061 | hardening | V3 | done | Deterministic Time Harness for Release/TTL Gates | Calendar-dependent tests create false regressions and hide real failures. | Added injected-now harness wiring for TTL/age-sensitive release gates and queue lifecycle paths, with deterministic regression fixtures in `client/memory/tools/tests/queue_gc.test.js`, `client/memory/tools/tests/ci_baseline_guard.test.js`, and `client/memory/tools/tests/post_launch_migration_readiness.test.js`. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V2-049, V2-050, V3-RACE-060 |
| V3-RACE-062 | hardening | V3 | done | Benchmark Artifact Consistency Gate (Report vs History vs Latest) | Conflicting benchmark artifacts undermine migration-go/no-go decisions. | Transition lane now emits policy-scoped `history/latest/report` artifacts and enforces strict coherence/freshness via `consistency-check` with scope contamination blocking (`client/runtime/systems/memory/rust_memory_transition_lane.ts`, `client/memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_transition_lane.test.js`). | V3-RACE-024, V3-RACE-026 |
| V3-RACE-063 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Warm-Path Rust Benchmark Lane (Daemon/Binary, No Cargo-Compile Tax) | Using `cargo run` in benchmark loops overweights compile/startup time and skews runtime performance decisions. | Benchmark lane now prewarms daemon transport, separates cold-build timing, and prefers prebuilt binary invocation for Rust probe/index commands before cargo fallback. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RACE-024, V3-RACE-025, V3-RACE-062 |
| V3-RACE-064 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Sync-Spawn Hotspot Reduction Wave (Worker/Daemon Shift) | High `spawnSync`/`execSync` usage raises latency, jitter, and throughput ceilings. | Memory recall/runtime hot lane shifted to daemon-first transport with binary-first CLI fallback, and benchmark receipts now publish rust p95/p99 latency metrics to verify no regression in warm path. | V3-OPS-005, V3-RACE-034, V3-RACE-063 |
| V3-RACE-065 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Rust Memory Vector Retrieval Activation (Hot-Path Similarity Search) | Embedding tables without active vector retrieval leave hybrid-memory gains partially unrealized. | Query runtime now supports vector similarity + lexical fusion with explicit score mode telemetry and active SQLite embedding map usage on runtime retrieval path. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RACE-023, V3-RACE-028, V3-RACE-052 |
| V3-RACE-066 | hardening | V3 | done | Memory DB AEAD/Envelope Encryption Cutover | Custom cipher shims lack authenticated encryption guarantees and standard key-lifecycle controls. | Rust memory DB now uses AEAD envelope payloads, automatically migrates legacy/plain hot-state rows at open, fails closed on legacy decrypt attempts, and includes tamper/retirement tests in `client/runtime/systems/memory/rust/src/db.rs`. | V3-RACE-027, V3-ENT-002, V3-RACE-023 |
| V3-RACE-067 | hardening | V3 | done | Memory Index Freshness Enforcement Gate | Stale indices drift from node reality and can degrade retrieval/navigation reliability. | Added policy-driven freshness gate with strict mode, optional rebuild path, persisted receipts/history, and merge/foundation contract integration (`client/runtime/systems/memory/memory_index_freshness_gate.ts`, `client/memory/tools/tests/memory_index_freshness_gate.test.js`). | V3-RACE-023, V3-RACE-062, V3-RACE-CONF-007 |
| V3-RACE-068 | extension | V3 | done | Advisory JS Purge Wave (`client/cognition/habits/scripts`, `client/memory/tools`) | Large JS advisory surface keeps language mix and maintenance overhead JS-heavy despite TS core migration. | Added wave planner with churn weighting and exception-registry diff snapshots, plus strict holdout audit integration in merge/foundation/contract checks. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V2-001, V2-003, BL-014, RM-002 |
| V3-RACE-CONF-008 | hardening | V3 | done | Merge-Conflict Marker CI Guard (`<<<<<<<`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) | Unresolved conflict markers in governance/runtime files can silently corrupt policy/behavior expectations. | Foundation/merge checks fail on conflict markers in tracked code/docs/client/runtime/config scopes, with remediation receipts and zero false negatives in test fixtures. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RACE-CONF-007, V3-AEX-002 |

## Execution Yield Recovery Intake (State Snapshot Derived, 2026-03-01)

Objective: close the live detect -> propose -> ship conversion gap (high signal throughput, low shipped execution) without weakening safety/governance controls.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Yield Recovery)

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Track and enforce proposal-funnel health (`detected -> accepted -> executed -> shipped`) | `V3-RACE-069` | done | Implemented in `client/runtime/systems/ops/execution_yield_recovery.ts` with persisted funnel metrics + dead-window alerts (`state/ops/execution_yield_recovery/*`). |
| Ensure high-worth proposals are executed before queue churn/starvation | `V3-RACE-070` | done | Added top-K reservation lane in `execution_yield_recovery` (queue `proposal_accepted` + decision `accept` receipts under apply mode). |
| Rebalance aggressive filters that suppress actionable high-score work | `V3-RACE-071` | done | Added filter-pressure recovery for high-score filtered rows (`rewrite/defer/escalate` lanes with receipts in queue + decision streams). |
| Auto-enrich missing `action_spec` proposals into executable plans | `V3-RACE-072` | done | Added deterministic action-spec synthesis for `action_spec_missing` proposals and requeue path with proposal-file mutation receipts. |
| Prevent open-queue debt accumulation by throttling intake when backlog pressure is high | `V3-RACE-073` | done | Added throttle-state publisher in `execution_yield_recovery` + ingest guard in `client/cognition/habits/scripts/sensory_queue.js` (`intake_throttle_low_priority`). |
| Restore degraded collectors/eyes faster when preflight failures persist | `V3-RACE-074` | done | Added eye-health SLO classifier with bounded auto-heal/escalation action receipts (`state/ops/execution_yield_recovery/eye_actions.jsonl`). |
| Make observation-only days explicit exception mode, not default drift | `V3-RACE-075` | done | Added execution-floor policy (`min_shipped_per_day`) with miss-floor detection and deterministic catch-up reservation actions. |
| Tie executed proposals to proven-work artifacts automatically | `V3-RACE-076` | done | Added shipped-outcome artifact bridge in `client/cognition/habits/scripts/proposal_queue.js` and lane-level bridge state in `execution_yield_recovery`. |
| Replace fixed escalation TTL rejects with adaptive TTL + salvage path | `V3-RACE-077` | done | Added adaptive escalation TTL + salvage queue behavior in `client/cognition/habits/scripts/queue_gc.js` and lane-level escalation salvage receipts. |

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-069 | hardening | V3 | done | Proposal Funnel SLO + Conversion Guard | Strong observation with weak execution can hide long zero-ship dead zones and stall objective progress. | Implemented in `client/runtime/systems/ops/execution_yield_recovery.ts` with persisted funnel metrics + dead-window alert detection and latest/history receipts. | RM-113, RM-114, BL-027 |
| V3-RACE-070 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Top-K Execution Reservation Lane | High-worth proposals can starve while queue churn/aging consumes execution bandwidth. | Implemented top-K reservation under apply mode (`proposal_accepted` + queue decision accept events) from highest-worth open proposals. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | RM-113, V3-RACE-069, V3-AEX-001 |

Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | BL-018, RM-114, V3-RACE-073 |

### Human Backlog Intake (Yield Recovery / Non-Automatable)

| Human Item (derived) | Owner | Status | Backlog Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Approve minimum execution-floor policy (including Sunday expectations) | human | queued | Set per-day shipped targets and explicit criteria for enabling observation-only override mode. |
| Set acceptable filter false-drop budget and override escalation thresholds | human | queued | Define max acceptable hard-drop rate for high-score proposals and escalation fallback behavior. |
| Run weekly execution triage on top-K open proposals | human | queued | Review/greenlight highest-worth queued work to keep conversion momentum and avoid aging-out loss. |
| Prioritize collector reliability repairs by business impact | human | queued | Decide repair order and urgency for degraded eyes (e.g., reddit_ai_agents, ollama_search). |
| Confirm evidence policy for “shipped” definition (what counts as shipped) | human | queued | Finalize shipped criteria contract so SLOs/alerts reflect real operational value, not noisy proxies. |

## Signal Intelligence Upgrade Intake (Second-Order Detection/Analysis, 2026-03-01)

Objective: move from first-order keyword/topic detection to second-order inference quality (implication, uncertainty, disconfirmation, temporal drift, and objective-path reasoning) without weakening execution/safety gates.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Second-Order Inference)

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Recover high-value negative signal (`tried X`, `failed`, `blocked`, `rejected`) instead of dropping as noise | `V3-RACE-078` | done | Add negative-signal extraction + salvage routing lane with typed failure semantics and explicit queue admission behavior. |
| Infer latent intent (`X implies likely need Y`) and validate implications before action | `V3-RACE-079` | done | Add implication inference graph with evidence spans + validator contracts to control false-positive drift. |
| Track cross-temporal pattern shifts (tone/frequency/emphasis deltas) | `V3-RACE-080` | done | Add temporal delta engine with daily/weekly change metrics and anomaly receipts per topic/objective. |
| Replace binary thresholds with calibrated confidence scoring | `V3-RACE-081` | done | Add probabilistic confidence + calibration metrics (e.g., Brier/reliability) to ranking/admission paths. |
| Support counterfactual replay (`would this have mattered 6 months ago?`) | `V3-RACE-082` | done | Add historical replay harness for detector versions and compare signal yield/precision across time windows. |
| Add adversarial hypothesis generation (why signal might be wrong) | `V3-RACE-083` | done | Add disconfirmation challenger lane that generates/validates anti-hypotheses before promotion. |
| Build multi-hop chain mapping from signal sources to T1 objective impact | `V3-RACE-084` | done | Add chain scorer (`eye -> topic -> implication -> objective`) with explainable path receipts. |
| Ingest non-textual signal (image/repo/market micro-activity) into the same inference plane | `V3-RACE-085` | done | Add non-text feature adapters and normalized schema so cross-signal correlation includes non-text lanes. |

### Net-New Canonical Queue

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-078 | hardening | V3 | done | Negative-Signal Recovery & Salvage Lane | Valuable demand/opportunity signals are often expressed as failure/friction and are currently under-captured. | `cross_signal_engine` now emits typed `negative_signal` hypotheses with extracted failure/friction terms, support evidence, and salvage trace keys; regression coverage validates negative-signal extraction/preservation alongside convergence outputs. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RACE-069, V3-RACE-071, V3-RACE-072 |
| V3-RACE-079 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Latent Intent Inference Graph | First-order tagging misses implied needs, causing under-actuation on high-opportunity weak signals. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/latent_intent_inference_graph.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/latent_intent_inference_policy.json` to emit `implied_need` edges with evidence spans/confidence from cross-signal hypotheses, enforce false-positive-ceiling validator contracts, and persist receipted outputs under `state/sensory/analysis/latent_intent/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/latent_intent_inference_graph.test.js`. | V3-RACE-078, V3-RACE-009 |
| V3-RACE-080 | hardening | V3 | done | Cross-Temporal Signal Delta Engine | Point-in-time snapshots hide momentum/reversal patterns that matter for prioritization. | `cross_signal_engine` now computes per-topic temporal deltas (`volume_delta_day`, `volume_delta_baseline`, `tone_delta`, `emphasis_delta`) with anomaly thresholds, emits `temporal_delta` hypotheses, and persists ranked `temporal_deltas` report output for downstream prioritization. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_lane_batch_delivery.js`. | V3-RACE-069, V3-RACE-074 |
| V3-RACE-081 | hardening | V3 | done | Confidence Calibration & Probability Contracts | Binary pass/fail confidence loses ranking quality and obscures uncertainty management. | Cross-signal hypotheses now carry calibrated probabilities (`probability_contract`), emit reliability bins + Brier artifacts, and enforce strict calibration contracts via `--strict=1` gate behavior when Brier exceeds policy thresholds. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_race_081_anchor.ts`. | V3-RACE-069, V3-RACE-062 |
| V3-RACE-082 | extension | V3 | done | Counterfactual Signal Replay Harness | Detector changes need historical context to avoid overfitting current traffic conditions. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/counterfactual_signal_replay.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/counterfactual_signal_replay_policy.json` to replay historical windows (default 180-day offset), compute precision/recall uplift deltas, and emit promotion-block signals on negative uplift; receipted outputs persist under `state/sensory/analysis/counterfactual_replay/` with regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/counterfactual_signal_replay.test.js`. | V3-RACE-003, V3-RACE-017, V3-RACE-081 |
| V3-RACE-083 | hardening | V3 | done | Adversarial Hypothesis Challenger Lane | Unchallenged high-confidence signals can be wrong and produce confident misallocation. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/adversarial_hypothesis_challenger.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/adversarial_hypothesis_challenger_policy.json` to generate disconfirmation claims for high-priority hypotheses, verify challenger outcomes (`win`/`unresolved`/`loss`), and block promotion when unresolved or winning challengers remain; receipted outputs persist under `state/sensory/analysis/adversarial_challenger/` with regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/adversarial_hypothesis_challenger.test.js`. | V3-RACE-081, V3-RACE-042 |
| V3-RACE-084 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Multi-Hop Objective Chain Mapper | Signal-to-objective linkage is currently shallow, limiting explainability and prioritization quality. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/multi_hop_objective_chain_mapper.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/multi_hop_objective_chain_policy.json` to fuse cross-signal hypotheses and latent-intent edges into explainable four-hop paths (`eye -> topic -> implication -> objective`) with confidence-weighted ranking receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/objective_chain_mapper/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/multi_hop_objective_chain_mapper.test.js`. | V3-RACE-078, V3-RACE-079, V3-RACE-080, V3-RACE-081 |
| V3-RACE-085 | extension | V3 | done | Multimodal Signal Adapter Plane (Non-Text Features) | Important activity signal exists outside text and is currently weakly integrated into inference. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/multimodal_signal_adapter_plane.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/multimodal_signal_adapter_policy.json` to normalize repo/image/market non-text features into one bounded-influence adapter stream (`state/sensory/analysis/multimodal_adapter/`) with strict source requirements and audit receipts; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/multimodal_signal_adapter_plane.test.js`. | V3-RACE-007, V3-RACE-041, V3-RACE-084 |

| Curate adversarial challenge corpus for calibration/replay | human | queued | Provide/approve representative counterexamples and challenge suites for reliability validation. |

## Analysis Learning Kernel Intake (Detector Quality Compounding, 2026-03-01)

Objective: make detection/analysis quality improve over time through explicit measurement, challenger promotion logic, uncertainty contracts, and source/truth weighting.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Quality Compounding)

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Build a gold evaluation corpus with blind scoring for detector quality | `V3-RACE-086` | done | Add labeled benchmark sets + blind evaluation runner with precision/recall/F1/calibration metrics and promotion gating receipts. |
| Add champion/challenger detector pipeline in shadow before live promotion | `V3-RACE-087` | done | Run candidate analyzers in parallel, compare uplift vs active detector, and only promote on policy-defined non-regression evidence. |
| Add abstain/uncertainty contract (`insufficient evidence`) to avoid forced low-confidence decisions | `V3-RACE-088` | done | Extend detector outputs with abstain semantics, enforce abstain-aware routing in admission/ranking, and track abstain-to-resolution outcomes. |
| Build dynamic source reliability graph (domain/author/source trust weighting over time) | `V3-RACE-089` | done | Add source trust score lane with decay/recovery rules and calibration against downstream truth outcomes. |
| Distinguish causal vs correlational signals in ranking | `V3-RACE-090` | done | Add causal-evidence scorer and penalize correlation-only hypotheses unless validated by replay/outcome receipts. |
| Add value-of-information planner to steer collection budget toward uncertainty reduction | `V3-RACE-091` | done | Route sensing/analysis budget by expected uncertainty reduction on T1 objectives with measurable decision uplift receipts. |
| Track full hypothesis lifecycle (`proposed -> tested -> accepted/rejected -> outcome`) as first-class ledger | `V3-RACE-092` | done | Add hypothesis ledger schema + status transitions + closure attribution to improve detector feedback loops. |
| Add detector error taxonomy + guarded auto-retuning | `V3-RACE-093` | done | Classify FP/FN error classes, auto-adjust thresholds/features within bounded policy limits, and require rollback on regression. |
| Add ensemble disagreement lane with escalation on high divergence | `V3-RACE-094` | done | Run independent analyzers and escalate when disagreement exceeds policy thresholds instead of silently averaging. |
| Add novelty/saturation detector to prioritize marginal-value signal | `V3-RACE-095` | done | Compute novelty vs saturation scores and down-rank over-covered topics while preserving high-value anomaly surfacing. |

### Net-New Canonical Queue

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-086 | hardening | V3 | done | Gold Eval Corpus + Blind Detector Scoring Lane | Detector quality cannot compound reliably without stable objective measurement artifacts. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/gold_eval_blind_scoring_lane.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/gold_eval_blind_scoring_policy.json` to run deterministic blind-ordered scoring on labeled eval packs with precision/recall/F1/Brier outputs and promotion gate receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/gold_eval_blind/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/gold_eval_blind_scoring_lane.test.js`. | V3-RACE-081, V3-RACE-082 |
| V3-RACE-087 | hardening | V3 | done | Champion/Challenger Detector Promotion Pipeline | Analysis changes need safe comparative rollout to prevent silent degradation. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/champion_challenger_detector_promotion.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/champion_challenger_detector_policy.json` to run parallel champion/challenger scoring on the same gold rows, compute uplift/regression deltas (`precision/recall/F1/Brier`), and fail promotion on policy violations with receipted outputs under `state/sensory/analysis/champion_challenger/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/champion_challenger_detector_promotion.test.js`. | V3-RACE-086, V3-RACE-062 |
| V3-RACE-088 | hardening | V3 | done | Abstain/Uncertainty Output Contract | Forced low-confidence decisions increase false positives and downstream churn. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/abstain_uncertainty_contract.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/abstain_uncertainty_contract_policy.json` to emit abstain reason codes for weak-evidence hypotheses, route abstained cases to review queue, and track abstain-resolution outcomes in receipted artifacts under `state/sensory/analysis/abstain_uncertainty/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/abstain_uncertainty_contract.test.js`. | V3-RACE-081, V3-RACE-069 |
| V3-RACE-089 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Dynamic Source Reliability Graph | Flat source weighting ignores reliability drift and harms analysis precision. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/dynamic_source_reliability_graph.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/dynamic_source_reliability_graph_policy.json` to update per-source reliability scores from hypothesis truth outcomes with bounded per-event influence, neutral-decay behavior, and calibration receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/source_reliability/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/dynamic_source_reliability_graph.test.js`. | V3-RACE-078, V3-RACE-081 |
| V3-RACE-090 | hardening | V3 | done | Causal-vs-Correlational Signal Scorer | Correlation-heavy ranking overstates weak hypotheses and misallocates execution bandwidth. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/causal_vs_correlation_signal_scorer.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/causal_vs_correlation_signal_scorer_policy.json` to combine chain confidence, replay uplift, and source reliability into causal scores, apply bounded penalties to correlation-only paths, and emit ranked receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/causal_signal_scorer/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/causal_vs_correlation_signal_scorer.test.js`. | V3-RACE-082, V3-RACE-084, V3-RACE-089 |
| V3-RACE-091 | extension | V3 | done | Value-of-Information Collection Planner | Detection budget should prioritize uncertainty reduction, not raw volume. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/value_of_information_collection_planner.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/value_of_information_collection_planner_policy.json` to rank collection actions by expected information gain from uncertainty and objective-impact signals, including predicted uncertainty-reduction receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/value_information_planner/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/value_of_information_collection_planner.test.js`. | V3-RACE-080, V3-RACE-081, V3-RACE-084 |
| V3-RACE-092 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Hypothesis Lifecycle Ledger | Detector learning is weak without explicit end-to-end hypothesis outcome memory. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger_policy.json` to persist hypothesis state transitions (`proposed/tested/accepted/rejected`) with challenger/outcome linkage into a durable ledger and lifecycle state artifacts under `state/sensory/analysis/hypothesis_lifecycle/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/hypothesis_lifecycle_ledger.test.js`. | V3-RACE-083, V3-RACE-084 |
| V3-RACE-093 | hardening | V3 | done | Detector Error Taxonomy + Guarded Auto-Retuning | Manual threshold tuning does not scale with detector complexity and drift. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/detector_error_taxonomy_autotune.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/detector_error_taxonomy_autotune_policy.json` to classify FP/FN error buckets, propose bounded threshold retunes, and enforce rollback-on-regression safeguards with receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/detector_autotune/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/detector_error_taxonomy_autotune.test.js`. | V3-RACE-086, V3-RACE-087, V3-RACE-092 |
| V3-RACE-094 | hardening | V3 | done | Ensemble Disagreement Escalation Lane | Single-analyzer certainty can mask blind spots on ambiguous/high-risk signals. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/ensemble_disagreement_escalation_lane.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/ensemble_disagreement_escalation_policy.json` to compute ensemble divergence metrics (stddev/range), apply risk-tier thresholds, and route high-divergence cases to adjudication with receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/ensemble_disagreement/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/ensemble_disagreement_escalation_lane.test.js`. | V3-RACE-083, V3-RACE-087 |
| V3-RACE-095 | extension | V3 | done | Novelty/Saturation Prioritization Engine | Over-covered topics consume bandwidth while low-frequency novel signals are under-prioritized. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/novelty_saturation_prioritization_engine.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/novelty_saturation_prioritization_policy.json` to score topics against historical frequency baselines, compute novelty/saturation/anomaly signals, and emit prioritized outputs/receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/novelty_saturation/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/novelty_saturation_prioritization_engine.test.js`. | V3-RACE-080, V3-RACE-091 |

## Analysis Governance & Reproducibility Intake (2026-03-01)

Objective: harden the analysis layer with explicit quality governance, reproducibility, shift decomposition, and safe promotion/rollback contracts so detector evolution remains trustworthy at scale.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Governance + Reproducibility)

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Enforce dedicated analysis-quality SLOs independent from execution SLOs | `V3-RACE-096` | done | Add detector SLO contract (precision/recall/calibration/abstain) with merge/promotion gates separate from shipped-execution metrics. |
| Add ground-truth governance (label adjudication + agreement metrics) | `V3-RACE-097` | done | Introduce labeling governance workflow, reviewer-agreement thresholds, and low-confidence label quarantine. |
| Require end-to-end feature/data versioning for detector reproducibility | `V3-RACE-098` | done | Version feature sets, schema hashes, and detector bundles so every analysis decision can be replayed exactly. |
| Decompose distribution shift into source/topic/style components | `V3-RACE-099` | done | Add shift-decomposition engine that identifies where drift originates and routes targeted remediation. |
| Require causal validation (replay/intervention evidence) for high-impact claims | `V3-RACE-100` | done | Add causal-validation gate for analysis outputs that materially change ranking/admission behavior. |
| Add active-learning queue for high-uncertainty/high-disagreement cases | `V3-RACE-101` | done | Route ambiguous cases into labeling/review loop and feed accepted labels back into challenger/eval lanes. |
| Add offline statistical lab bridge (R/Python optional, artifact-only) | `V3-RACE-102` | done | Support offline calibration/causal diagnostics with signed artifacts consumed by production gates; keep runtime TS/Rust. |
| Add optional R analytics runner with research-organ best-fit integration (artifact-verified uplift only) | `V3-RACE-361` | done | Add optional offline runner (R or TS fallback) that emits signed artifacts into offline bridge and applies bounded research confidence uplift only when verified fit criteria pass. |
| Add sensitivity/privacy-aware signal scoring contract | `V3-RACE-103` | done | Add policy-aware handling for sensitive classes with restricted usage, masking, and audit receipts. |
| Add detector rollback/migration safety contract | `V3-RACE-104` | done | Provide one-command detector rollback with parity replay evidence and schema compatibility checks. |
| Add cross-objective interference guard for analysis changes | `V3-RACE-105` | done | Prevent detector improvements for one objective from degrading other objective lanes beyond policy bounds. |

### Net-New Canonical Queue

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-096 | hardening | V3 | done | Analysis Quality SLO Contract | Analysis quality must be measured directly, not inferred from execution-only outcomes. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/analysis_quality_slo_contract.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/analysis_quality_slo_contract_policy.json` to enforce analysis-specific SLO gates (`precision/recall/F1/Brier/abstain_rate`) independently from execution-green signals, with promotion fail-closed receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/quality_slo/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/analysis_quality_slo_contract.test.js`. | V3-RACE-086, V3-RACE-081 |

| V3-RACE-098 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Feature/Data Versioning Reproducibility Contract | Detector decisions must be exactly replayable to support safe evolution and audits. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/feature_data_reproducibility_contract.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/feature_data_reproducibility_contract_policy.json` to pin feature schema/data hashes, detector version, and decision hashes per snapshot and verify replay equivalence with deterministic receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/reproducibility/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/feature_data_reproducibility_contract.test.js`. | V3-RACE-003, V3-RACE-086, BL-024 |
| V3-RACE-099 | hardening | V3 | done | Distribution-Shift Decomposition Engine | Aggregate drift scores hide root causes and slow effective remediation. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/distribution_shift_decomposition_engine.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/distribution_shift_decomposition_policy.json` to compute per-component distribution shift scores (source/topic/style/population), trigger threshold-based remediation actions, and emit receipted decomposition artifacts under `state/sensory/analysis/distribution_shift/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/distribution_shift_decomposition_engine.test.js`. | V3-RACE-080, V3-RACE-089 |
| V3-RACE-100 | hardening | V3 | done | Causal Validation Gate for High-Impact Analysis Claims | Correlational signals can drive wrong policy changes without causal validation discipline. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/causal_validation_gate_high_impact.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/causal_validation_gate_policy.json` to score high-impact claims for causal confidence from replay/intervention evidence and fail closed when policy thresholds are not met, with receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/causal_validation_gate/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/causal_validation_gate_high_impact.test.js`. | V3-RACE-082, V3-RACE-090 |

| V3-RACE-102 | extension | V3 | done | Offline Statistical Lab Artifact Bridge (R/Python Optional) | Advanced calibration/causal diagnostics benefit from offline tooling while runtime should remain deterministic and fast. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/offline_statistical_lab_artifact_bridge.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/offline_statistical_lab_artifact_bridge_policy.json` to ingest signed offline lab artifacts with required-field + trusted-key provenance checks and fail-closed behavior, persisting verified artifacts/receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/offline_lab_bridge/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/offline_statistical_lab_artifact_bridge.test.js`. | V3-RACE-086, V3-RACE-096, V3-RACE-098 |
| V3-RACE-361 | extension | V3 | done | Offline R Analytics Runner + Research Organ Best-Fit Integration | Optional offline R analytics can improve calibration decisions when bridged through verified artifacts, while runtime remains deterministic with TS fallback paths. | Added `client/runtime/systems/research/offline_r_analytics_runner.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/offline_r_analytics_runner_policy.json` (with optional script `research/r/offline_research_analytics.R`) to emit signed artifacts into `state/sensory/offline_lab/artifacts/` and auto-run `offline_statistical_lab_artifact_bridge`; integrated `client/runtime/systems/research/research_organ.ts` + `client/runtime/config/research_organ_policy.json` with analytics-bridge fit criteria (`sample_size`, `brier_improvement`, `causal_precision_lift`) and bounded confidence uplift with fail-safe fallback behavior; regression test coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/offline_r_analytics_runner.test.js` and `client/memory/tools/tests/research_organ.test.js`. | V3-RACE-102, V3-RACE-096, V3-RACE-098 |
| V3-RACE-103 | hardening | V3 | done | Sensitivity/Privacy-Aware Signal Scoring Contract | Analysis gains must not introduce governance/privacy regressions on sensitive data classes. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/sensitivity_privacy_aware_scoring_contract.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/sensitivity_privacy_scoring_policy.json` to enforce sensitive-class handling contracts (approval-required, score restriction, field masking, fail-closed blocking) with audit receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/privacy_scoring/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/sensitivity_privacy_aware_scoring_contract.test.js`. | V3-RACE-033, V3-RACE-044, V3-RACE-096 |
| V3-RACE-104 | hardening | V3 | done | Detector Rollback & Migration Safety Contract | Safe detector evolution requires fast rollback with evidence, not manual patchwork under pressure. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/detector_rollback_migration_safety_contract.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/detector_rollback_migration_safety_policy.json` to snapshot detector bundles, enforce schema-compatibility and replay-parity checks, and perform one-command rollback with auditable history/receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/detector_rollback/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/detector_rollback_migration_safety_contract.test.js`. | V3-RACE-087, V3-RACE-098 |
| V3-RACE-105 | hardening | V3 | done | Cross-Objective Interference Guard for Analysis Changes | Improving one objective can unintentionally degrade others without explicit non-regression controls. | Added `client/runtime/systems/sensory/cross_objective_interference_guard.{ts,js}` + `client/runtime/config/cross_objective_interference_guard_policy.json` to evaluate multi-objective before/after deltas against per-objective interference budgets and fail promotion when any objective exceeds allowed regression, with guard receipts under `state/sensory/analysis/objective_interference_guard/`; regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/cross_objective_interference_guard.test.js`. | V3-RACE-084, V3-RACE-096, V3-RACE-104 |

## Architecture Simplification & Scale Intake (No-Regression Refactors, 2026-03-01)

Objective: simplify structural complexity and improve scalability/operability without reducing current function, reliability, robustness, or safety posture.

### Technical Requirements Mapping (Refactor/Simplify)

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Remove overlap between `merge_guard`, `foundation_contract_gate`, and `contract_check` using one manifest-driven check registry | `V3-RACE-106` | done | Added canonical guard check manifest (`client/runtime/config/guard_check_registry.json`) + shared loader/runtime (`client/runtime/systems/ops/guard_check_registry.ts`) consumed by guard entrypoints with parity regression tests. |
| Unify policy loading/validation/defaulting into one runtime primitive | `V3-RACE-107` | done | Added shared policy runtime primitive (`client/runtime/lib/policy_runtime.ts`) and migrated active client/memory/control-plane lanes to consume canonical load/merge/path behavior with regression coverage. |
| Reduce high `spawnSync` fan-out in operational hot paths via worker/daemon shift | `V3-RACE-108` | done | Migrate top spawn-heavy lanes to long-lived workers/daemons with CLI fallback retained only for emergency compatibility. |
| Normalize `state/` artifact contracts (`latest/history/receipt`, retention, schema/freshness) | `V3-RACE-109` | done | Added shared state artifact contract primitive (`client/runtime/lib/state_artifact_contract.ts`) and migrated active memory lanes to canonical latest/history/receipt helpers with regression coverage. |
| Simplify memory transport behavior behind one strict abstraction | `V3-RACE-110` | done | Consolidate daemon/cli/fallback logic under one contract (`transport`, detail, retry class, cooldown semantics) with uniform telemetry. |
| Split backlog monolith into canonical machine-readable registry + generated views | `V3-RACE-111` | done | Keep one authoritative backlog source and generate markdown views (`active`, `archive`, `human`) to reduce manual drift. |
| Define one pluggable analysis-kernel stage interface (`detect -> infer -> calibrate -> challenge -> score -> emit`) | `V3-RACE-112` | done | Introduce stage contracts + adapter registry so analysis lanes evolve modularly without pipeline fragmentation. |
| Continue TS/JS compatibility-tail retirement where parity is proven | `V3-RACE-113` | done | Retire dual-path runtime logic and keep only explicit wrappers where compatibility is required by policy. |

### Net-New Canonical Queue

| ID | Class | Version | Status | Upgrade | Why | Exit Criteria | Depends On |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| V3-RACE-106 | hardening | V3 | done | Unified Guard Check Registry (Manifest-Driven Gates) | Duplicated check definitions across guard entrypoints create maintenance drag and drift risk. | Single manifest defines checks/dependencies/strictness; `merge_guard`/`foundation_contract_gate`/`contract_check` consume generated plans; non-regression harness proves parity of pass/fail outcomes. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_race_106_anchor.ts`. | V3-AEX-002, V3-RACE-CONF-008 |
| V3-RACE-107 | hardening | V3 | done | Shared Policy Runtime Primitive | Repeated ad-hoc policy parsing/defaulting raises contract drift and bug surface area. | Central policy runtime handles schema/default/coercion/path resolution; migrated lanes show no behavior regressions and reduced parser duplication. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_github_sync.js`. | BL-024, V3-RACE-CONF-007 |
| V3-RACE-108 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Spawn Fan-Out Reduction Wave (Worker/Daemon Core) | Sync process fan-out limits throughput and increases latency/jitter under scale. | Spawn broker now resolves router hardware plans in-process via model router exports (no per-call shell spawn on default path), preserves emergency spawn sync fallback for custom/router-failure lanes, and emits transport telemetry (hardware plan transport) with regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/spawn_broker.test.js`. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_race_108_anchor.ts`. | V3-RACE-063, V3-RACE-064, V3-OPS-005 |
| V3-RACE-109 | hardening | V3 | done | State Artifact Contract Normalization | Inconsistent state artifact layouts/retention rules increase operational complexity and audit ambiguity. | Shared artifact schema/layout (`latest/history/receipt`) and retention/freshness policies are enforced via contract gates across target lanes. Evidence: `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_runtime_anchors/v3_race_109_anchor.ts`. | BL-024, V3-RACE-062, V3-RACE-CONF-007 |
| V3-RACE-110 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Memory Transport Abstraction Unification | Mixed transport semantics increase complexity and observability inconsistency in memory runtime behavior. | Added canonical transport primitive `client/runtime/systems/memory/memory_transport.ts` (runtime wrapper `.js`) and migrated `memory_recall` rust query/get lanes to use one daemon/cli/fallback contract with normalized telemetry (`transport_attempts`, fallback reason, transport detail); added regression coverage in `client/memory/tools/tests/memory_transport.test.js`. | V3-RACE-023, V3-RACE-024, V3-RACE-025 |
| V3-RACE-111 | extension | V3 | done | Canonical Backlog Registry + Generated Views | Manual monolithic backlog editing scales poorly and risks status/metadata drift. | Added `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_registry.ts` (+ runtime ) with `sync/check/status`, canonical registry output (`client/runtime/config/backlog_registry.json`), generated views (`docs/client/backlog_views/active.md`, ), strict drift receipts, policy contract, and regression test `client/memory/tools/tests/backlog_registry.test.js`. | V3-RACE-CONF-003, V3-RACE-107 |
| V3-RACE-112 | primitive-upgrade | V3 | done | Analysis Kernel Stage Interface & Plugin Contracts | Analysis pipeline fragmentation slows safe evolution and increases integration overhead. | Analysis kernel stage API is live with pluggable contracts and regression harness proving equivalent outputs on baseline detector set. | V3-RACE-078, V3-RACE-081, V3-RACE-083, V3-RACE-084 |
| V3-RACE-113 | hardening | V3 | done | Compatibility Tail Retirement (TS-First Runtime) | Dual TS/JS paths keep unnecessary complexity once parity is proven. | Added `compatibility_tail_retirement` guard (`client/runtime/systems/ops/compatibility_tail_retirement.ts`) with strict wrapper/allowlist policy, receipts, and regression test; retired duplicate runtime body for `client/runtime/systems/ops/backlog_registry.js` to TS-bootstrap wrapper to enforce TS-first execution. | V2-001, V2-003, BL-014, V3-RACE-068 |

## Control Plane OS-Readiness Delta Intake (2026-03-01)

Objective: consolidate the remaining "not done / not fully ready" control-plane blockers into one explicit readiness queue so promotion to full OS-ready operation is auditable and deterministic.

### Readiness Mapping (Not Done / Not Ready)

| Not-Ready Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Complete Rust spine extraction of remaining control-plane hot/security paths | `V3-RACE-034` | done | Keep as first technical unlock for full control-plane readiness and remove remaining JS/V8 hot-path exposure. |
| Add independent out-of-band safety veto plane | `V3-RACE-050` | done | Keep as mandatory correlated-fault/supply-chain containment lane before "100% ready" claim. |
| Remove duplicated guard check definitions across gate entrypoints | `V3-RACE-106` | done | Manifest-driven check registry is live and consumed by merge/foundation/contract guard lanes with regression coverage. |
| Unify policy loading/default/coercion runtime | `V3-RACE-107` | done | Shared policy runtime primitive is live and migrated in active client/memory/control-plane lanes with regression tests. |
| Reduce remaining spawn fan-out in operational hot paths | `V3-RACE-108` | done | Shift target lanes to long-lived worker/daemon contracts with benchmark/SLO receipts. |
| Normalize state artifact contracts (`latest/history/receipt`, retention/freshness) | `V3-RACE-109` | done | Canonical artifact contract helper and migrated lanes are live with receipt/history/layout checks. |
| Unify memory transport semantics/telemetry | `V3-RACE-110` | done | Enforce one transport abstraction (daemon/cli/fallback) with parity and normalized telemetry contracts. |
| Retire dual TS/JS compatibility tail where parity is proven | `V3-RACE-113` | done | Remove non-essential dual paths while preserving policy-approved compatibility wrappers only. |
| Exit default shadow/local authority posture for control-plane policies | `V3-RACE-114` | done | Add explicit live-activation gate with reversible emergency fallback and soak evidence before default-live promotion. |

## Technical Quality Intake (Valid Grok-Derived Requirements, 2026-03-01)

Objective: capture only the technically valid, non-duplicative engineering requirements from the latest external critique and map them into canonical queue IDs.

### Valid Requirement Mapping

| Derived Requirement | Canonical Backlog Handling | Status | Requirement Action |
|---|---|---|---|
| Script surface is too large to govern safely (`package.json` script sprawl) | `V3-RACE-115` | done | Add command-registry and script-surface rationalization lane with compatibility aliases + CI guardrails. |
| Entrypoint runtime contract remains over-dependent on wrapper/bootstrap indirection | `V3-RACE-116` | done | Standardize dev/prod entrypoint runtime contracts (`tsx`/dist) and constrain bootstrap path to explicit compatibility-only fallback. |
| Architectural layer boundaries need machine-enforced import contracts | `V3-RACE-117` | done | Add dependency-boundary manifest + CI enforcement for cross-layer imports and cycle prevention. |
| Runtime state still mixes hot-path and artifact-path contracts in places | `V3-RACE-118` | done | Formalize hot-state vs audit-state tiering and enforce low-latency source-of-truth reads from runtime stores. |
| CI quality signals need one standardized scorecard beyond pass/fail | `V3-RACE-119` | done | Add unified CI quality scorecard (coverage + flake + duration budgets + critical-lane gates) with fail-closed thresholds. |
| Runtime/config tooling still contains hardcoded absolute workspace paths | `V3-RACE-120` | done | Add relocatable path contract and remove absolute host paths from runtime/client/runtime/config/tooling surfaces. |
| Package manifest is missing standard metadata expected by npm/security/release tooling | `V3-RACE-121` | done | Enforce package-manifest standards (`name`, `version`, `private`, `license`, `description`, `repository`, `engines`, publish guards) with CI check. |
| Public-facing repo root still mixes professional docs with persona-specific identity artifacts | `V3-RACE-122` | done | Segment persona/private identity docs into internal namespace and keep public root/docs operator-focused + enterprise-readable. |
| CI workflows overlap and duplicate core lint/test signals on push/PR | `V3-RACE-123` | done | Rationalize workflow graph so required checks are unique, stable, and non-duplicative while preserving gate coverage. |
| Root-level artifact sprawl hurts first impression and discoverability | `V3-RACE-124` | done | Define root-surface contract, relocate specialized artifacts to namespaced paths, and enforce with root-lint check. |
| Legal/license wording is technically enforceable but can create avoidable trust friction | `V3-RACE-125` | done | Normalize legal copy to plain professional language and isolate defensive/security posture into dedicated policy docs. |
| Full CI still fails due integrity sealing drift (`integrity_kernel` unsealed files) | `V3-RACE-126` | done | Integrity baseline is sealed and deterministic regressions were fixed so `npm test` is green in strict lane (`530/530`). |
| External-facing repository surface remains noisier than ideal for enterprise review | `V3-RACE-127` | done | Added public/operator profile contract + docs aliases (`docs/client/PUBLIC_OPERATOR_PROFILE.md` + expanded `docs_surface_contract`) with regression lint enforcement. |
| Script surface remains too broad for fast operational onboarding despite new registry controls | `V3-RACE-128` | done | Executed Wave II script reduction lane (`script_surface_reduction_wave2`): retired 213 non-critical `:status` aliases, preserved critical/referenced scripts, and published command-map diff receipts. |
